constraints.name: operation_type
constraints.description: 每次 redistribution 步骤必须严格选择当前 idli 数量最多和最少的两人（若存在多个极值则任选其一）,计算转移量 R = ceil((P - Q) / 2),并将 R 个 idli 从最多者转移给最少者；该过程持续进行直至所有元素值相等或判定无法收敛。
constraints.formal: while max(A) != min(A): P = max(A), Q = min(A), R = ceil((P - Q) / 2), A[max_idx] -= R, A[min_idx] += R

objective.description: 计算按照给定确定性规则进行数值转移直至所有元素相等所需的操作步数,若过程无法收敛达成均分则返回-1

invariants.name: conservation
invariants.description: The total sum of values across all elements remains strictly constant throughout the redistribution process. Each operation transfers a quantity between the current maximum and minimum elements while preserving their pairwise sum. This invariant is used to verify initial feasibility and guarantees that the process converges to a uniform distribution if the total sum is divisible by the count.

invariants.name: monotonicity
invariants.description: The pointers tracking the current minimum and maximum values in the frequency representation move strictly inward without backtracking. The minimum index only increments and the maximum index only decrements, ensuring that each value bucket is processed at most once as an extremum and enabling efficient simulation.
